notes: The file builds the base-change infrastructure for function fields of smooth plane curves, culminating in the localization-commutes-with-base-change iso `L ⊗_F K(C) ≃ₐ[L] FractionRing(L ⊗_F C.CR)`. It contains 16 priority-100000 instance pins specifically to defeat an `Algebra F / Algebra F[X]` diamond on `AdjoinRoot W.polynomial`; there is substantial proof duplication between the `coordRingScalarExtFwd` and `fwdPinned` variants (near-verbatim copies of both the surjectivity adjoin argument and the basis-transport injectivity argument). No sorries; no maxHeartbeats overrides.
